reasoning: Given the failure of the yfinance tool, I am relying on the general principle that short-term stock movements are very close to a random walk (P=0.5). Constellation Brands (STZ) has seen a massive 40% slump over the past year (due to Mexican tariff fears and macro headwinds). Momentum in the short term may continue to be slightly negative, bringing the near-term probability slightly below 0.5. Over longer horizons, the upward drift of equities compensates for this momentum, pulling the probability closer to 0.5 or slightly above. Following the instruction to keep distant dates closer to 0.5 and stay close to 0.5 overall, my estimates are 0.48 (1 week), 0.49 (1 month), and 0.50 (3 months).
